response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Japanese spoken narration matches the English on-screen text precisely. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON provided scene boundaries but lacked the narration text, which was manually transcribed from the audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to the vocal narration bursts; the title card was subtitled as a prominent visual event at the start and end of the narrative sequence for context.

subtitles.original: Fall in Grace - Usada Pekora Birthday Live 2020
subtitles.english: [Title: Fall in Grace - Usada Pekora Birthday Live 2020]

subtitles.original: かつて天界は、光と秩序の神々によって統治されていた。
subtitles.english: Long ago, the Heavenly Realm was governed by the gods of light and order.

subtitles.original: 人間界、魔界、そして天界。
subtitles.english: The Human Realm, the Demon Realm, and the Heavenly Realm.

subtitles.original: 全ての界は、光の聖池によって均衡を保たれていた。
subtitles.english: All worlds were kept in balance by the Celestial Lake of Light.

subtitles.original: 神聖なる『法』は、何人たりとも聖池に立ち入ること...
subtitles.english: A sacred "Law" forbade any from entering the lake...

subtitles.original: ...あるいはその水を汚すことを禁じていた。
